title: VulkanBobby
description: Small compatibility layer between Bobby and VulkanMod
body:
# VulkanBobby

A small compatibility layer between **[VulkanMod](https://modrinth.com/mod/vulkanmod)** and **[Bobby](https://modrinth.com/mod/bobby)** for Minecraft 1.21.*.  
Keeps Bobby’s cached (fake) chunks visible with VulkanMod.

![Screenshot](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e0075caf6ad94a4bd073aa8f92dff020ab1382a1.jpeg)

## Requirements
- Bobby **5.2.\***, VulkanMod **0.5.\***
- Cloth Config and Mod Menu — needed to change Bobby’s render distance in-game.

## Description

Using Bobby and VulkanMod together with this mod provides extended render distance similar to Distant Horizons and other extended-view mods.

If you have questions about using VulkanMod and Bobby together with this mod, please report them in the [**GitHub Issues section**](https://github.com/arturidzze/VulkanBobby/issues).
